summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ Phase 9 — Public Discovery Ranking + Internal Matching Governance. Backend: 35/36 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All UI features verified working including RankingAdmin with weight sliders, fit subfactors (distance_location highlighted as MAJOR FACTOR), mode toggle, engine params, config audit trail; RankingShadow with search inputs, travel flexibility chips, shadow comparison, customer bucket view; PublishQueue has 'Ranking' link.

ranking_config_get.admin_access: PASS - Admin can get config with weights, fit_subfactors, mode, engine params
ranking_config_get.venue_manager_access: PASS - Venue manager can get config

ranking_config_update.weights_validation: PASS - Weights must sum to ~1.0 (returns 400 if not)
ranking_config_update.fit_subfactors_validation: PASS - Fit subfactors must sum to ~1.0 (returns 400 if not)
ranking_config_update.engine_params_update: PASS - Admin can update diversity_strength, freshness_boost_days, quality_threshold, verified_boost_points
ranking_config_update.audit_trail: PASS - Config updates create audit trail entries with actor, changes, reason, timestamp

ranking_run.admin_access: PASS - Admin can run engine, returns buckets (best_matches, smart_alternatives, expert_picks)
ranking_run.venue_manager_access: PASS - Venue manager can run engine
ranking_run.search_params_echo: PASS - Search params echoed in response

ranking_shadow.admin_access: PASS - Admin can run shadow comparison
ranking_shadow.comparison_structure: PASS - Returns venue_id, venue_name, current_position, engine_position, position_change, engine_score, customer_fit, from_pipeline
ranking_shadow.venue_manager_access: PASS - Venue manager can run shadow

ranking_explain.full_breakdown: PASS - Returns total_score, customer_fit, customer_fit_breakdown (distance_location, event_type, capacity, budget, style_vibe, amenity), supply_quality, freshness, engagement

ranking_eligible.admin_access: PASS - Admin can get eligible venues list
ranking_eligible.venue_manager_access: PASS - Venue manager can get eligible venues
ranking_eligible.rm_access: PASS - RM can get eligible venues

distance_scoring.locality_scoring: PASS - Scoring works with preferred locality
distance_scoring.gurgaon_scoring: PASS - Scoring works for Gurgaon venues

role_gating.internal_roles_access: PASS - All internal roles (admin, venue_manager, rm, vam) can access ranking endpoints
role_gating.only_admin_config_update: PASS - Only admin can update config

frontend_ranking_admin.page_loads: PASS - RankingAdmin page loads with data-testid='ranking-admin'
frontend_ranking_admin.weight_inputs: PASS - All 4 weight inputs present (customer_fit, supply_quality, freshness, engagement)
frontend_ranking_admin.fit_subfactor_inputs: PASS - All 6 fit subfactor inputs present with distance_location highlighted as MAJOR FACTOR
frontend_ranking_admin.engine_params: PASS - All 4 engine parameter inputs present
frontend_ranking_admin.save_button: PASS - Save Configuration button present and functional
frontend_ranking_admin.audit_trail: PASS - Config Audit Trail section expandable
frontend_ranking_admin.shadow_link: PASS - Shadow comparison button navigates to RankingShadow

frontend_ranking_shadow.page_loads: PASS - RankingShadow page loads with data-testid='ranking-shadow'
frontend_ranking_shadow.search_inputs: PASS - City, locality, event_type, guests, budget inputs present
frontend_ranking_shadow.travel_flexibility_chips: PASS - All 5 travel flexibility chips present (strictly_nearby, moderately_flexible, city_wide, willing_to_travel, destination)
frontend_ranking_shadow.run_button: PASS - Run Engine button present and functional
frontend_ranking_shadow.shadow_view: PASS - Shadow comparison view shows position changes
frontend_ranking_shadow.bucket_view: PASS - Customer Buckets view shows best_matches, smart_alternatives, expert_picks

frontend_publish_queue.ranking_link: PASS - PublishQueue has 'Ranking' link in header
frontend_publish_queue.navigation: PASS - Clicking Ranking link navigates to RankingAdmin

bugs_fixed.issue: AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'items' - amenities field can be list or dict
bugs_fixed.fix: Added isinstance check to handle both dict and list formats for amenities

bugs_fixed.issue: AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'values' - amenities field can be list or dict
bugs_fixed.fix: Added isinstance check to handle both dict and list formats for amenities

critical_code_review_comments: ranking.py: Well-structured scoring engine with clear weight hierarchy (Customer Fit 0.55 dominant)
ranking.py: Distance/Location correctly weighted as MAJOR FACTOR (0.25 within Customer Fit)
ranking.py: Travel flexibility presets dynamically adjust distance weight (strictly_nearby=0.40, destination=0.03)
ranking.py: Zone mappings cover NCR (Delhi/Gurgaon/Noida) and major Indian cities
ranking.py: Haversine distance calculation for lat/lng when available
ranking.py: Proper audit trail with actor, changes, reason, timestamp
ranking.py: Config validation ensures weights and fit_subfactors sum to ~1.0
ranking.py: Bucketing logic for best_matches, smart_alternatives, expert_picks
RankingAdmin.js: Clean UI with weight sliders, fit subfactors (distance highlighted), mode toggle, engine params
RankingShadow.js: Search inputs, travel flexibility chips, shadow comparison with position changes, bucket view
PublishQueue.js: Ranking link properly integrated in header

test_credentials.admin: admin@venuloq.in / admin123 (role: admin - can update ranking config)
test_credentials.venue_manager: venuemanager@venuloq.in / test123 (role: venue_manager - can view config, run engine, but cannot update config)
test_credentials.rm: rm1@venuloq.in / rm123 (role: rm - can view/run but not config update)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded venues and acquisitions (acq_pub_test_001, acq_pub_test_002)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 9 Ranking Engine fully tested. Backend endpoints at /api/ranking/* all working. Frontend routes at /team/admin/ranking (RankingAdmin) and /team/admin/ranking/shadow (RankingShadow). Scoring: Customer Fit (0.55) with subfactors [distance_location(0.25), event_type(0.20), capacity(0.20), budget(0.20), style_vibe(0.10), amenity(0.05)], Supply Quality (0.25), Freshness (0.10), Engagement (0.10). Travel flexibility presets dynamically adjust distance weight. Zone mappings cover NCR and major Indian cities. Config stored in ranking_config collection with audit trail. Fixed bugs: amenities field handling for both dict and list formats.

real_apis: All ranking engine endpoints are real (no mocking)
